commit_scope: Resolve the bounded fourth-arm literal blueprint floor by lowering current registry aliases to NodeID packets.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Fourth-arm table emission now resolves the admitted literal bp aliases to NodeID packets, so audit-log and hex execute as manifest-covered fkwu rows while the full Form suite remains divergence-free.
test_flows: form:full validate.sh -> 146 fourth-arm bands, 565 ok, 0 divergent
metal-plane audit -> macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF receipts pass

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/audit-log.fk form-stdlib/tests/audit-log-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hmac-sha256.fk form-stdlib/token.fk form-stdlib/tests/token-band.fk
local_validation.notes: audit-log and hex now run as true fourth-leg rows at 4 and 14. Full validation reports fourth arm: 146 band(s) four-way, 565 ok, 0 divergent after rebasing over the current speech/model/oracle and BML/Hati floor. A temporary token manifest admission diverged with fourth=1 while Go/Rust/TypeScript returned 3, so token remains a named recipe-composition residual rather than a bp-literal floor admission. Metal-plane audit passes macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF receipts.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet. GitHub checks will be monitored after PR creation.

deploy_validation.summary: No deployment triggered by this Form-native floor commit.

phase_gate.gate: Current literal bp registry aliases needed by audit-log and hex lower to NodeID packets before fkwu execution.
phase_gate.next: Lift token mint/validate divergence and then replace the literal alias list with the generated BP table when the broader node vocabulary floor is ready.
